name: Jonti Siman
bio:
Jonti Siman is a Seattle-based bassist — equally at home on upright and electric — and a regular voice in the city's jazz scene.
He leads the Jonti Siman Trio with guitarist Owen Thayer and drummer William Sage, playing original compositions alongside instrumental takes on American roots and popular music, and collaborates widely around the city, including with vocalist Elnah Jordan.
